seo.title: Privacy policy | Alfora
seo.description: Alfora privacy and information processing policy.

page.title: Privacy policy
page.description: Learn how Alfora handles information and files used within the platform.

legal.processingText: Whenever technically possible, files are processed directly in the user’s browser and are not sent to Alfora’s servers.
legal.dataText: Alfora only receives information that users choose to communicate by email or through other enabled channels. This information is used to respond to questions, provide support and improve the platform.
legal.technicalText: Hosting, security, analytics or external content services may process technical data such as IP address, browser, device, access date and pages visited according to their own policies.
legal.retentionText: Messages may be retained for as long as necessary to respond and provide support. Users may request correction or deletion of information they have provided directly to Alfora, where applicable.
legal.changesText: This policy may be updated to reflect technical, legal or operational changes to the platform.
